name: Five Iron Golf
about: Five Iron Golf Pittsburgh-Market Square is an indoor golf simulator venue featuring 11 bays equipped with Trackman technology and high-speed cameras. It operates as an all-in-one entertainment venue, combining a driving range, sports bar, and event space in downtown Pittsburgh. The venue offers simulator rentals, golf lessons, custom club fittings, and hosts various corporate and private events. Members receive complimentary play, discounts on services, and access to exclusive events, with options for non-members to book hourly simulator sessions and lessons.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman technology provides detailed swing data
Downtown Pittsburgh location offers urban convenience
Full-service bar and chef-inspired menu enhance the experience
Variety of virtual courses including PGA Tour venues like Pebble Beach

food_and_drink.notes: Chef-inspired bar bites menu, pizzas, and various appetizers
Full-service bar with craft cocktails, local beers, and drink specials

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual-radar technology with high-speed cameras for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or rent equipment at the venue. Club fitting services are also available with Callaway equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue features a full-service bar and kitchen with its own menu of craft cocktails, local beers, and chef-inspired bites.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 virtual holes typically takes approximately 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Five Iron Golf offers kids' parties and junior clinics, with a casual atmosphere that accommodates families and golfers of all skill levels.
